review_title: Rocketium is the best producer for your adverts.
description: Since I am a planning engineer and often need to create pictorial reports on the project's completion and progress, Rocketium helped me produce my own clips through which I was able to explain the progress stages of work in audio and video with the addition of panels that include data, tables, and graphics.
author: Ayman S.
pros: Rocketium is a fantastic tool that is simple to use and allows users of all skill levels to quickly design and modify posters and films. It also allows you to build enormous posters and panels in a tiny amount of space that are easy to keep or share via e-mail. Rocketium's ready-made templates encourage design enthusiasm and the ease with which you can stick and remove images and backdrops, as well as change fonts and font sizes, making you feel like you're in a drawing class.
cons: ِActuality, it is difficult to find unwanted things, it is very easy to enter the application, all tools and settings are clear and you can easily access them, also the automatic adjustments and presets provided by the application make the design and editing processes very easy.

review_title: Fast and complete tool for Video Automation
description: We are in the media industry and thanks to Rocketium we were able to easily integrate their API in our CMS to let our Journalist complement their articles with video stories. This lets journalist with little to no video making training quickly turn around photo galleries and user videos in engaging short videos.
author: Enrico K.
pros: Rocketium system makes it easy and fast to create simple videos, what make them better than any other similar systems in their price range is the API that really lets you easily integreate and leverage their technology in your own workflow.
cons: There is nothing i really dislike about it, in the last couple of years their team has really improved both their frontend and their API and have been attentive and quick to respond to any issues.

review_title: Better than others but still need further improvments
description: We're quite happy with it and looking for further improvments and consideration of the feedbacks.
author: Sumeet M.
pros: We've been using Lumen and certainly it's better than L5. As it has a feature of custom voice and theme for each slides. Secondly, it has more themes than other tools available. Also the music library is also large.
cons: We couldn't create a single slide at the end with all the credits in it as the very same feature is available in Lumen5 and Wave. Secondly there's very limited free images and videos available to use.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Rocketium Rocks!!!
description: Our customer had a requirement to create videos based on pre-approved templates. We integrated our solution with the Rocketium API to automate the entire video creation process. Rocketium's mixture of technology, template design and their people deliver quality at scale.
author: Richie M.
pros: Rocketium provides a platform to create high quality videos affordably at scale. Our original use case was outside of their offering but they were able to work with us to meet our requirements and added the features to their platform as part of the base offering. Their API is robust and their support is second to none. I highly recommend Rocketium.
cons: No cons to speak of, every hurdle has been addressed. With all API integrations there is a learning curve but nothing too painful...

review_title: Great platform for creating programatic videos
description: We needed to quickly create thousands of videos, and the Rocketium team was helpful in setting us up to do that.
author: William R.
pros: The API makes it easy to generate video files at scale. Rocketium was able to translate our video template into a design and JSON format, so that we could creates many videos with unique content. [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] from the custom success team is very helpful in troubleshooting issues and helping our team get results.
cons: A few parts of the API documentation were a bit confusing, but the customer success team helped clarify.

review_title: Great video editing app!
author: Elena P.
pros: I use the free version, but I also tested the paid version (which, of course, gives you a lot more to play with). The free version, although limited, is still pretty good to help you make a great looking video, if you don't mind the Rocketium logo at the end. I like the fact that they have free photos and clips inside the app, which you can insert into your videos. Of course, you can also use your own. It's easy to use and anybody can learn it quickly enough.
cons: The Rocketium logo at the end, but that's the price of free :). You can't do a lot of things with the free option, but you can do enough.

review_title: Functionally usable and good
author: Mark S.
pros: It's a straightforward UI that allows you to get your video up and out there fast. I like that it allows switching between slides and customizing very efficient, where some others are a bit clunky. It renders video fast compared to some others, as well, though it's nominal. The ability to add voice to the videos is a great feature too. Adding images and music is simple and easy.
cons: I can't get past the feel of their templates. It's just ... a bit older feeling. Slightly outdated ... can't put my finger on it, but it just doesn't have the modern look that is mostly expected. But the bottom-line is ... get your content out there and this does that.

review_title: Leading solution
author: Oliver B.
pros: There’s stock quality videos available for free within the app, meaning you can quickly build professional looking videos with ease. This is a standout feature in this category. If you need to create cheap but good social video ads, I recommend this tool.
cons: Mobile app is a good idea but needs a fair bit of work.

review_title: Give Rocketium the title of World's Easiest Tool to Create Social Media Video
author: Naveen D.
pros: I love using rocketium !! They made the complex process of creating Videos in a matter of few minutes. I used to create videos using After Effects which used to take a really long time to create a single video but after using rocketium . I can pump out many videos in a matter of minutes. Thak you so much rocketium team.
cons: I would never say this as a con but there are only a few templates in the basket but I strongly believe many templates are being baked and will be served hot and fresh soon to the rocketium customers.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Rocketize your Content Marketing Effort
author: Ron Elius S.
pros: The ease of use is what I love about Rocketium. The video templates cater to my chosen industry, and that’s a huge help for us because time is saved for customization not searching blindly in the age of information overwhelm.
cons: Customization is limited for different templates but anyways, it's way better than a boring video that had no value in it.
author_profession: Freelance B2B Copywriter for the Food & Beverage Companies

review_title: Best tool Create your own video content with ease
description: Rocketium contributed to breaking the barrier and unleashing everyone by designing their own videos and publishing them on social networking sites with ease.
author: Mohammed M.
pros: Rocketium is an excellent application that does not require special devices and equipment. The ease of use and flexibility that it provides is great, as the ready-made templates that are available on the interface of the application allow the user to modify his videos and prepare designs and banners in professional ways. Rocketium makes the process of making designs very fast and also enables to make any required changes with ease.
cons: There are no problems with Rocketium, I love everything about this app and the support from the Rocketium team is always ready. It gives great results even for beginners, as they can create and send their videos with ease.

review_title: Getting a great response on social with Rocketium videos
description: I'm sure you are familiar with the online graphics app called Canva, it's great for making images for social media. To me, Rocketium very much solves the same pain point but in video-format. Just as Canva enables 'anyone to become a designer' Rocketium allows anyone to become a 'video creator'. For a long time I've seen how popular 'typographic' videos are on social, since they can be viewed (and read) whether or not the user has the sound on. This really hit home when I read that VaynerMedia had a whole division dedicated to captioning videos for their big-brand clients. Of course, before I found your product, this would have been inconceivable, as there was no way to scale the video creation process effectively. So far, I've made, perhaps three video versions of our blog posts using your product and click-through rates from Facebook to our website have doubled. It's such a stream-lined 'fill-in-the-gaps' approach that it only takes me about 12 minutes to create the video. ;-D If I could change one thing I would add in the ability to reorder and sort the captions when creating the slides. Sometimes I enter them incorrectly or just want to change the order but the only way to do this (to my knowledge) is by cutting and pasting the text. I'll definitely spread the word around in my community of around six thousand software-hungry subscribers over at 1WD.tv I love it. I'm getting a great response on social with these videos. Congrats on a great product and I look forward to using it much more in the new year. And thanks for being so responsive. :-)
author: Luke S.
pros: The ease of use - Rocketium is organized in a similar fashion to presentation software such as Google Slides or Powerpoint. It just makes it 10x by empowering everyone with the brain and hands of a designer.
cons: Just the ability to reorder and sort the captions when creating the slides.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Making video creation great again
author: Nitin S.
pros: Rocketium crunches video creation times, and the # of people with varied expertises needed to assemble orofessional videos.
cons: It has bugs that crop up now and then for power users, but their team is always hands-on to fix things on the fly.

review_title: I love how easy it is to use.
author: Naveen J.
pros: Favourite thing about Rocketium is the ease of use. Adding images simply overlaying it with text has helped me make more than 50 videos a month for Sportskeeda's Facebook channel.
cons: I want the most are the labels/tags/folder system. This would help me categorize my content in a better way.

review_title: Un punto de encuentro entre profesionales y usuarios.
description: Rocketium ha hecho que mi empresa mejorara profesionalmente.
author: Manuel G.
pros: El mejor editor de vídeo, sencillo y profesional. Las prestaciones y características han superado todas nuestras expectativas.
cons: De momento cubre todas mis expectativas.

review_title: Make pro-looking videos in minutes
author: Rick S.
pros: Love that it allows you to create videos using their templates and your own images or video clips, add music, animations, etc - all without taking hundreds of hours of time
cons: Limited creative freedom on positioning of text/logos, only a few fonts available, making it difficult to match client brands accurately
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A solid solution to a brand's ever-growing creative adaptation needs
description: Reducing creative TaTs for the business and campaign launches. Freeing up creative resources by enabling business leads to work on Rocketium.
author: Kartik A.
pros: Automation while allowing customisation.
cons: The tool's limited applicability in the business
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Rocketium is worth the investment
author: André L.
pros: How fast we can have a video created and all the options it presents.
cons: It could have more templates to choose from.

review_title: Fast Video Preparation
author: Volkan O.
pros: I really like to prepare videos fast in Rocketium. You can find contents to use freely as well. Good product.
cons: There can be some other functionalities and more fonts. Adjustment of time is a bit tricky, it can be improved.

review_title: Really fast and convenient video creator
description: We are now creating videos, which before we didn't have time to produce :)
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I love the fact it comes with a huge video and image library, and you can just put together a decent looking video in less than half an hour complete with music and buzzfeed style transitions.
cons: It would be great if we could upload our own fonts at the pro-level membership, also would be great if rocketium could broker more deals to include more free video assets. Also would be great to get access to HD 1080 output instead of 720p, maybe this could be a perk of the professional membership and up.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The best app for marketing
author: Dykenlove M.
pros: Easy to use, and I've got more options and tools
cons: I appreciate the app and costumer services.

review_title: Good way to make easy videos
description: Good way to make easy videos
author: Miguel P.
pros: - you have access to stock images and videos - you can export your videos in 720p quality - you can choose between more than 100 different fonts to use in your videos
cons: - you have a limited number a videos per month (depending on your plan) - you do not templates, but rather styles to use in your video - you cannot export in 1080p
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Rocketium Review
description: Overall, Rocketium is a great tool to quickly create videos with text overlay. However, the platform is not as flexible as more professional programs, such as Premier.
author: Sergio P.

review_title: Awesome Site to edit and create video
description: I created a video for my presentation and it took me 30 mins to create it. I love this software.
